channel.title: Welcome to Blowfish! :tada: on Justin Zhou
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to Blowfish! :tada: on Justin Zhou

item.title: Welcome to Blowfish
item.description:
Blowfish is packed with tons of features.

The original aim of Blowfish was to develop a theme that was simple and lightweight. The theme is a fork of Congo and expands its initial vision.

item.title: Installation
item.description:
Simply follow the standard Hugo Quick Start procedure to get up and running quickly.

Detailed installation instructions can be found below. Instructions for updating the theme are also available.

Installation
#

These instructions will get you up and running using Hugo and Blowfish from a completely blank state. Most of the dependencies mentioned in this guide can be installed using the package manager of choice for your platform.

item.title: Getting Started
item.description:
This section assumes you have already installed the Blowfish theme.

We just launched a CLI tool to help you get started with Blowfish. It will help you with installation and configuration. Install the CLI tool globally using:

item.title: Configuration
item.description:
Blowfish is a highly customisable theme and uses some of the latest Hugo features to simplify how it is configured.

The theme ships with a default configuration that gets you up and running with a basic blog or static website.

item.title: Homepage Layout
item.description: Blowfish provides a fully flexible homepage layout. There are two main templates to choose from with additional settings to adjust the design. Alternatively, you can also provide your own template and have complete control over the homepage content.

item.title: Shortcodes
item.description:
In addition to all the default Hugo shortcodes, Blowfish adds a few extras for additional functionality.

Alert
#

alert outputs its contents as a stylised message box within your article. It’s useful for drawing attention to important information that you don’t want the reader to miss.

item.title: Front Matter
item.description: In addition to the default Hugo front matter parameters, Blowfish adds a number of additional options to customise the presentation of individual articles. All the available theme front matter parameters are listed below.

item.title: Multiple Authors
item.description: Some websites have more than one author contributing with content and therefore require more than a single default author across the entire website. For those use-cases, Blowfish allows users to extend the list of authors using the multiple authors feature.

item.title: Partials
item.description:
Analytics
#

Blowfish provides built-in support for Fathom Analytics, Google Analytics and Umami Analytics. Fathom is a paid alternative to Google Analytics that respects user privacy.

item.title: Thumbnails
item.description:
Thumbnails
#

Blowfish was enhanced in order to make it easy to add visual support to your posts. To do so, you just need to place an image file (almost all formats are supported but we recommend .png or .jpg) that starts with feature* inside your article’s main directory, as shown in the example below.

item.title: Content Examples
item.description: If you’ve been reading the documentation in order, you should now know about all the features and configurations available in Blowfish. This page is designed to pull everything together and offer some worked examples that you might like to use in your Hugo project.

item.title: Series
item.description: Blowfish provides a feature to group a set of articles together under a “series”. Placing an article under a series will display the rest of the series articles in each single page and provide a quick way to navigate amongst them. You can see an example of this above.

item.title: Advanced Customisation
item.description: There are many ways you can make advanced changes to Blowfish. Read below to learn more about what can be customised and the best way of achieving your desired result.

item.title: Hosting & Deployment
item.description:
There are many ways to deploy your Hugo website built with Blowfish. The theme is designed to be flexible in almost any deployment scenario.

Blowfish is built using relative URLs throughout the theme. This enables sites to easily be deployed to sub-folders and hosts like GitHub Pages. There’s usually no special configuration required for this to work as long as the baseURL parameter has been configured in the hugo.toml file.

item.title: Firebase: Views & Likes
item.description: In order to be able to support dynamic data across your website we’ve added the support to integrate Firebase. This will allow you to use the views feature across lists and posts.

item.title: Handbook on Teaching Empirical Software Engineering: Online Materials
FEEC/UNICAMP IA382 - Seminar in Computer Engineering
Build your homepage using Blowfish and Hugo
item.description: Just one year ago, I created Blowfish, a Hugo theme crafted to build my unique vision for my personal homepage. I also decided to make it an open-source project. Fast-forward to today, and Blowfish has transformed into a thriving open-source project with over 600 stars on GitHub and a user base of hundreds. In this tutorial, I’ll show you how to get started and have your website running in a couple of minutes.

item.title: Blowfish チュートリアル - レポジトリ
Multiple Authors
item.description: A quick example of how multiple authors could be used.

item.title: Thumbnails
item.description: A quick example of how to start using Thumbnails in your artciles.

item.title: Blowfish テンプレート - GitHub レポジトリ
Icons
item.description:
Blowfish has built-in support for a number of FontAwesome 6 icons. These can be included in your website through either the icon partial or icon shortcode.

Additionally, custom icons are also fully supported. Simply provide your own SVG icon assets by placing them in the assets/icons/ directory in the root of your project. Any icons in the icons directory will then be available to use throughout the theme. In order to achieve automatic color filling, every SVG path needs the fill="currentColor" XML attribute.

item.title: Users
item.description:
Real websites that are built with Blowfish. Check the full list in JSON format.

Blowfish user? To add your site to this list, submit a pull request.

item.title: ユーザー
item.description: Blowfish で構築された実際のウェブサイトです。すべてのウェブサイト一覧は JSON 形式 で閲覧可能です。

item.title: 用户列表
item.description: 这里有使用 Blowfish 构建的网站实例。点击这里以 JSON 形式查看完整列表。

item.title: Markdown
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown formatting that can be used in Blowfish, also it shows how some basic HTML elements are decorated.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: This is an example of a rich content summary.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Mathematical notation
item.description: KaTeX can be used to render mathematical notation within articles.

item.title: Charts
item.description: Blowfish includes Chart.js for powerful charts and data visualisations.

item.title: Diagrams and Flowcharts
item.description: It’s easy to add diagrams and flowcharts to articles using Mermaid.

item.title: Recipe Template
item.description:
Thank you for wanting to contribute to Blowfish’s community.

How to start?
#

This is a template article that will explain how to create a new article for Blowfish’s guide section.

item.title: 2人目のダミー作者
item.description: 2人目のダミー作者の素晴らしいダミープロフィールです。

item.title: Advanced
item.description: This is the advanced tag. Just like other listing pages in Blowfish, you can add custom content to individual taxonomy terms and it will be displayed at the top of the term listing. 🚀

item.title: Amostras
item.description:
O Blowfish dá vida ao seu conteúdo. 😍

Esta seção contém algumas páginas de demonstração que mostram como o Blowfish renderiza diferentes tipos de conteúdo. Você também pode ver uma página de exemplo de listagem de taxonomia.

item.title: Amostras
item.description:
O Blowfish dá vida ao seu conteúdo. 😍

Esta secção contém algumas páginas de demonstração que mostram como o Blowfish renderiza diferentes tipos de conteúdo. Também pode ver uma página de exemplo de listagem de taxonomia.

item.title: Avançado
item.description: Esta é a tag “Avançado”. Assim como outras páginas de listagem no Blowfish, você pode adicionar conteúdo personalizado a termos de taxonomia individuais e ele será exibido no topo da listagem de termos.

item.title: Avançado
item.description: Esta é a tag “Avançado”. Tal como outras páginas de listagem no Blowfish, pode adicionar conteúdo personalizado a termos de taxonomia individuais e ele será apresentado no topo da listagem de termos.

item.title: Avancé
item.description: Ceci est le tag “Avancé”. Comme pour les autres pages de liste dans Blowfish, vous pouvez ajouter du contenu personnalisé aux termes de taxonomie individuels et il sera affiché en haut de la liste des termes.

item.title: Avanzado
item.description: Esta es la etiqueta “Avanzado”. Al igual que otras páginas de listado en Blowfish, puedes agregar contenido personalizado a términos de taxonomía individuales y se mostrará en la parte superior del listado de términos.

item.title: Beispiele
item.description:
Blowfish bringt Ihre Inhalte zum Leben. 😍

Dieser Bereich enthält einige Demo-Seiten, die zeigen, wie Blowfish verschiedene Arten von Inhalten rendert. Sie können auch eine Beispiel-Taxonomie-Auflistung-Seite sehen.

item.title: Benutzer
item.description:
Echte Websites, die mit Blowfish erstellt wurden. Die vollständige Liste im JSON-Format anzeigen.

Blowfish-Benutzer? Um Ihre Website zu dieser Liste hinzuzufügen, reichen Sie einen Pull Request ein.

item.title: Campioni
item.description:
Blowfish dà vita ai tuoi contenuti. 😍

Questa sezione contiene alcune pagine demo che mostrano come Blowfish esegue il rendering di diversi tipi di contenuto. Puoi anche vedere una pagina di esempio elenco tassonomia.

item.title: Documentação
item.description:
Simples, mas poderoso. Aprenda a usar o Blowfish e seus recursos.

Esta seção contém tudo o que você precisa saber sobre o Blowfish. Se você é novo, confira o guia de Instalação para começar ou visite a seção de Exemplos para ver o que o Blowfish pode fazer.

item.title: Documentação
item.description:
Simples, mas poderoso. Aprenda a utilizar o Blowfish e as suas funcionalidades.

Esta secção contém tudo o que precisa de saber sobre o Blowfish. Se é novo, consulte o guia de Instalação para começar ou visite a secção de Exemplos para ver o que o Blowfish pode fazer.

item.title: Documentación
item.description:
Simple, pero potente. Aprende a usar Blowfish y sus características.

Esta sección contiene todo lo que necesitas saber sobre Blowfish. Si eres nuevo, consulta la guía de Instalación para comenzar o visita la sección de Ejemplos para ver lo que Blowfish puede hacer.

item.title: Documentation
item.description:
Simple, mais puissant. Apprenez à utiliser Blowfish et ses fonctionnalités.

Cette section contient tout ce que vous devez savoir sur Blowfish. Si vous êtes nouveau, consultez le guide d’Installation pour commencer ou visitez la section Exemples pour voir ce que Blowfish peut faire.

item.title: Documenti
item.description:
Semplice ma potente. Scopri come utilizzare Blowfish e le sue funzionalità.

Questa sezione contiene tutto ciò che devi sapere su Blowfish. Se sei nuovo, consulta la guida Installazione per iniziare o visita la sezione Esempi per vedere cosa può fare Blowfish.

item.title: Dokumentation
item.description:
Einfach, aber leistungsstark. Erfahren Sie, wie Sie Blowfish und seine Funktionen nutzen können.

Dieser Abschnitt enthält alles, was Sie über Blowfish wissen müssen. Wenn Sie neu sind, lesen Sie den Installations-Leitfaden, um zu beginnen, oder besuchen Sie den Bereich Beispiele, um zu sehen, was Blowfish kann.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: Die fantastische Beispielbiografie des zweiten Beispielautors.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: La increíble biografía ficticia del segundo autor ficticio.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: La super bio fictive du deuxième auteur fictif.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: A incrível bio fictícia do segundo autor fictício.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: A fantástica biografia fictícia do segundo autor fictício.

item.title: Dummy Second Author
item.description: 假装这里有一份第二位作者的简介。

item.title: Échantillons
item.description:
Blowfish donne vie à votre contenu. 😍

Cette section contient quelques pages de démonstration qui montrent comment Blowfish rend différents types de contenu. Vous pouvez également voir une page exemple de liste de taxonomie.

item.title: Esempio di elenco di tassonomia degli autori
item.description: Un rapido esempio di come iniziare a utilizzare le tassonomie degli autori nei tuoi articoli.

item.title: Fortgeschritten
item.description:
Dies ist das Tag “Fortgeschritten”. Genau wie bei anderen Auflistungsseiten in Blowfish können Sie benutzerdefinierten Inhalt zu einzelnen Taxonomiebegriffen hinzufügen, der oben in der Begriffsliste angezeigt wird.

Sie können diese Inhaltsseiten auch verwenden, um Hugo-Metadaten wie Titel und Beschreibungen zu definieren, die für SEO und andere Zwecke verwendet werden.

item.title: Galeria
item.description:
Veja o que é possível com o Blowfish.

Esta seção contém links para modelos de exemplo e páginas criadas usando o Blowfish para inspirar você.

item.title: Galeria
item.description:
Veja o que é possível com o Blowfish.

Esta secção contém ligações para modelos de exemplo e páginas criadas utilizando o Blowfish para o inspirar.

item.title: Galería
item.description:
Mira lo que es posible con Blowfish.

Esta sección contiene enlaces a plantillas de ejemplo y páginas creadas con Blowfish para inspirarte.

item.title: Galerie
item.description:
Sehen Sie, was mit Blowfish möglich ist.

Dieser Bereich enthält Links zu Beispielvorlagen und Seiten, die mit Blowfish erstellt wurden, um Sie zu inspirieren.

item.title: Muestras
item.description:
Blowfish da vida a tu contenido. 😍

Esta sección contiene algunas páginas de demostración que muestran cómo Blowfish renderiza diferentes tipos de contenido. También puedes ver una página de ejemplo de listado de taxonomía.

item.title: Nuno Coraçao
item.description: La fantastica biografia di Nuno.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: Nunos fantastische Beispielbiografie.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: La increíble biografía ficticia de Nuno.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: La super bio fictive de Nuno.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: Nuno の素晴らしいダミープロフィールです。

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: A incrível bio fictícia do Nuno.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: A fantástica biografia fictícia do Nuno.

item.title: Nuno Coração
item.description: 假装这里有一份 Nuno 的简介。

item.title: Receitas
item.description:
Receitas, guias e tutoriais para o Blowfish

Usuário do Blowfish? Para adicionar seu guia a esta lista, confira o template.

Esta seção contém guias para vários cenários sobre como configurar seu tema. Se você é novo, confira o guia de Instalação para começar ou visite a seção de Amostras para ver o que o Blowfish pode fazer.

item.title: Receitas
item.description:
Receitas, guias e tutoriais para o Blowfish

Utilizador do Blowfish? Para adicionar o seu guia a esta lista, consulte o template.

Esta secção contém guias para vários cenários sobre como configurar o seu tema. Se é novo, consulte o guia de Instalação para começar ou visite a secção de Amostras para ver o que o Blowfish pode fazer.

item.title: Recetas
item.description:
Recetas, guías y tutoriales para Blowfish

¿Usuario de Blowfish? Para añadir tu guía a esta lista, consulta la plantilla.

Esta sección contiene guías para varios escenarios sobre cómo configurar tu tema. Si eres nuevo, consulta la guía de Instalación para comenzar o visita la sección de Muestras para ver lo que Blowfish puede hacer.

item.title: Recettes
item.description:
Recettes, guides et tutoriels pour Blowfish

Utilisateur de Blowfish ? Pour ajouter votre guide à cette liste, consultez le modèle.

Cette section contient des guides pour divers scénarios de configuration de votre thème. Si vous êtes nouveau, consultez le guide d’Installation pour commencer ou visitez la section Échantillons pour voir ce que Blowfish peut faire.

item.title: Recipes
item.description:
Recipes, guides, and tutorials for Blowfish

Blowfish user? To add your guide to this list, check the template.

This section contains guides for a variety of scenarios on how to configure your theme. If you’re new, check out the Installation guide to begin or visit the Samples section to see what Blowfish can do.

item.title: Rezepte
item.description:
Rezepte, Anleitungen und Tutorials für Blowfish

Blowfish-Nutzer? Um Ihre Anleitung zu dieser Liste hinzuzufügen, schauen Sie sich die Vorlage an.

Dieser Bereich enthält Anleitungen für verschiedene Szenarien zur Konfiguration Ihres Themes. Wenn Sie neu sind, schauen Sie sich die Installations-Anleitung an, um zu beginnen, oder besuchen Sie den Beispiele-Bereich, um zu sehen, was Blowfish kann.

item.title: Secondo autore fittizio
item.description: La fantastica biografia fittizia di Dummy Second Author.

item.title: Showcase
item.description:
See what’s possible with Blowfish.

This section contains links to example templates and pages created using Blowfish to get you inspired.

item.title: Showcase
item.description:
See what’s possible with Blowfish.

This section contains links to example templates and pages created using Blowfish to get you inspired.

item.title: Tag
item.description: Blowfish ha il pieno supporto per le tassonomie Hugo e si adatterà a qualsiasi impostazione tassonomica. Gli elenchi di tassonomia come questo supportano anche il contenuto personalizzato da visualizzare sopra l’elenco dei termini.

item.title: Usuarios
item.description:
Sitios web reales construidos con Blowfish. Consulta la lista completa en formato JSON.

¿Usuario de Blowfish? Para agregar tu sitio a esta lista, envía un pull request.

item.title: Usuários
item.description:
Sites reais construídos com Blowfish. Confira a lista completa em formato JSON.

Usuário do Blowfish? Para adicionar seu site a esta lista, envie um pull request.

item.title: Utilisateurs
item.description:
De vrais sites web construits avec Blowfish. Consultez la liste complète en format JSON.

Utilisateur de Blowfish ? Pour ajouter votre site à cette liste, soumettez une pull request.

item.title: Utilizadores
item.description:
Sites reais construídos com Blowfish. Consulte a lista completa em formato JSON.

Utilizador do Blowfish? Para adicionar o seu site a esta lista, submeta um pull request.

item.title: Vitrine
item.description:
Découvrez ce qui est possible avec Blowfish.

Cette section contient des liens vers des modèles et pages d’exemple créés avec Blowfish pour vous inspirer.

item.title: サンプル
item.description:
Blowfish はあなたのコンテンツに命を宿します。😍

このセクションは、 Blowfish で様々な種類のコンテンツをどのように表示するのかを紹介するデモページを含みます。例としては分類一覧ページも参考になります。

item.title: ショーケース
item.description:
Blowfish で何が出来るか見てみる。

このセクションはテンプレートの例やインスピレーションを得ることの出来る Blowfish を使用して作成されたページのリンクがあります。

item.title: タグ
item.description: Blowfish は Hugo の分類システムを完全にサポートし、どのような分類システムの設定でも適合できます。このような分類システムのリストは、用語リストの上に表示されるカスタムコンテンツもサポートしています。

item.title: ドキュメント
item.description:
シンプル、それでいて強力。 Blowfish の利用方法と特徴について学ぶ。

このセクションでは、Blowfish について知っておくべきことをすべて網羅しています。初めての方は、まずインストールガイドをご覧いただくか、サンプルセクションで Blowfish で何ができるかを確認してみてください。

item.title: レシピ
item.description:
Blowfish のためのレシピ、ガイド、チュートリアル

Blowfish ユーザーですか? この一覧にあなたのガイドを加える際は、テンプレートを確認してください。

item.title: 作者列表示例
item.description: 在你的文章中添加不同作者的简单示例。

item.title: 使用指南
item.description:
Blowfish 的使用指南和教程

您是 Blowfish 的用户吗? 要将您自己编写的指南添加到此列表，请查看参考模板。

item.title: 文档
item.description:
了解如何使用简单而强大的 Blowfish。

本章节包含了你需要了解的有关 Blowfish 的所有信息。如果你是新用户，请查阅安装 指南，或者访问示例 来了解 Blowfish 能做什么。

item.title: 标签
item.description: Blowfish 支持基于 Hugo 的所有分类方法。同时，当前的标签预览页也支持展示自定义内容。

item.title: 示例
item.description:
Blowfish 让你的内容栩栩如生。 😍

本节包含一些示例页面，展示了Blowfish如何呈现不同类型的内容。你还可以参考标签页面的示例。

item.title: 著者のタクソノミーリストの例
item.description: あなたの記事で著者のタクソノミーを使う方法の簡単な例です。

item.title: 高度なタグ
item.description: こちらは高度なタグです。 Blowfish の他のページの様に、個々の分類条項にカスタムコンテンツの追加やそれを条項リストの一番上に表示することが可能です。🚀

item.title: 高级
item.description: 这是高级标记。类似其他 Blowfish 中的其他列表页面，你可以在分类列表页添加自定义内容，这部分内容会显示在顶部。🚀
